ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "inception_year" INTEGER /* Year the cryptocurrency was first introduced */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the cryptocurrency belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the cryptocurrency (coin or unmined-coin) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* 30-day trade volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the official website of the cryptocurrency */,
  "whitepaper_url" TEXT /* URL of the whitepaper of the cryptocurrency */,
  "total_supply" TEXT /* Total supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "circulating_supply" TEXT /* Circulating supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "max_supply" TEXT /* Maximum supply of the cryptocurrency */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  "block_time" INTEGER /* Average time to mine a block */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the cryptocurrency's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrencies_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cryptocurrencies_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (coin or unmined-coin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the type icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the market data belongs to */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* 30-day trade volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the market data was recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "24h_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "7d_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price over the last 7 days */,
  "24h_volume" REAL /* 24-hour trade volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "24h_low" REAL /* Lowest price in the last 24 hours */,
  "24h_high" REAL /* Highest price in the last 24 hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hard_forks" (
  "fork_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hard fork */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the hard fork belongs to */,
  "hard_fork_of" TEXT /* Code of the cryptocurrency the hard fork is based on */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the hard fork occurred */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the hard fork */,
  "block_height" INTEGER /* Block height at which the hard fork occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fork_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hard_forks_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similar_cryptocurrencies" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity entry */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the similarity belongs to */,
  "similar_to" TEXT /* Code of the similar cryptocurrency */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* A score indicating the similarity between the cryptocurrencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similar_cryptocurrencies_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_cryptocurrency_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the tracking belongs to */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cryptocurrency the user is interested in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cryptocurrency_tracking_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_cryptocurrency_tracking_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., theme, language) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_dashboard" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout of the dashboard (e.g., JSON string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_dashboard_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
